title: Ideas Ice Dragon Building Set，Compatible with Mainstream brands Adults Collectible MOC Dragon Model STEM Toy for GOT Fans Home Decor,Creative Gift for Kids Boys & Girls 8-16 (1019 PCS)
features: A meticulously crafted ice dragon model: This ice dragon model is inspired by magical elements. With mysterious powers and wings spread, it flies above the glacier. Every detail of this ice dragon is perfectly presented, making it a must-have for fans and collectors.

Interactive Effects：You can enhance the atmosphere of the ice dragon by adjusting its head, wings, tail and feet, and you can display your finished ice dragon model on the included stand to ensure stability and enhance its eye-catching visual appeal.
Ideal Display Size: The Ice Dragon model measures 18.11 inches long, 20.47 inches wide, and 16.14 inches tall, Its perfect size makes it ideal for display in your home, office, or on a bookshelf.

1019 High-Quality Blocks: This set includes 1019 high-quality building blocks and comes with a detailed instruction book. Both adults and children aged 12 and up will enjoy several hours of building fun. The set is also compatible with most major brands, expanding creative possibilities.

Perfect Gift for Enthusiasts: Whether it’s Christmas, a birthday, or any special occasion, this Ice Dragon block set makes an excellent gift for children and collectors. Its detailed design, makes it a standout in any collection.
